attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ST.TRANSACTION_ID ,
ST.APPLICATION_NAME ,
ST.APPLICATION_ID ,
ST.LEDGER_ID      ,
ST.ORG_ID         ,
ST.TRX_CLASS  ,
ST.ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
ST.TRX_NUMBER    ,
ST.TRX_DATE       ,
ST.TRX_LINE_ID    ,
ST.TRX_LINE_NUM   ,
ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
ST.AMOUNT,
ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED  AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
ST.PROCESS_STATUS,
ST.HEADER_ID,
ST.ORDER_NUMBER,
ST.ELEMENT_TYPE   ,
ST.RULE_START_DATE,
ST.RULE_END_DATE  ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE1 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE2 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE3 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE4 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE5 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE6 ,
ST.SKU,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME   ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ST.ATTRIBUTE11, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE12, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE13, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE9,
ST.ATTRIBUTE16,
ST.ATTRIBUTE20,
ST.ATTRIBUTE21,
ST.ATTRIBUTE23,
ST.ATTRIBUTE28,
ST.ATTRIBUTE17,
ST.ATTRIBUTE7,
ST.ATTRIBUTE8,
ST.ATTRIBUTE10,
ST.ATTRIBUTE15,
ST.DATE_ATTRIBUTE46,
ST.DATE_ATTRIBUTE47,
ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE51,
ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE52,
ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53,
ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE54,
ST.CUST_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
ST.PARTY_ID,
ST.PARTY_SITE_ID 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA  ST
 WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA  EL
 WHERE
 EL.TRANSACTION_ID= ST.TRANSACTION_ID
 AND EL.APPLICATION_ID = ST.APPLICATION_ID)
